descriptionInUI: Runs the in-mission scenario for SCAR flights: spawns a moving HVT signature convoy plus decoy and clutter convoys, and watches the HVT for being killed or reaching its no-strike destination; if the SCAR target is a real surface-to-surface missile site, watches that instead (killed, or launched). Reports the outcome back to the campaign. No mis-ID scoring yet. Inert unless a SCAR flight is planned.
